Hello, my name is Bad Boy, and I’m going to tell you how despite being paralyzed on one side of my body and walking with a humiliating limp… I’ve dated and slept with THOUSANDS of drop dead gorgeous women…beauty pageant winners like Miss Croatia… the kind of chicks who are sot hot…most guys would consider just making-out with one of their all time greatest accomplishments. 



I’m going to tell you how, even though I’m a cripple thanks to a bullet tearing through my 12 year old brain, stunting my growth and setting my social development back more than 4 years… I went from alone and afraid of dying without sleeping with any 10s… to being voted the #1 Pick Up Artist in the world by PUA Summit in 2012…I was even featured in Neil Strauss’s legendary book The Game, and make regular appearances on MTV, and in magazines like FHM and Playboy…



But before I tell you about that transformation, I want to show you my X Ray Glasses…



[Truncated: Lead With Curiosity, Fascinations, and Promises]



Well I’m here to give you a MAJOR wake up call…You don’t need to 6’4,” or an Internet Billionaire, or Neil Fucking Strauss to have beautiful women feeling desperate to spend the night with you. 



I know this because I’m NONE of those things…and yet somehow I manage to have more steamy threesomes and all night sex marathons then 99.99% of all men on planet earth…



And I do it with a severe disability that…if most guys experienced…would probably make them accept that they were going to be a virgin forever…



I was 12 years old. The Serbia-Croatia war had just ended after 4 bloody years…and 20,000 dead. I was out in the streets celebrating…just like all of my other countrymen…happy to no longer live in fear of bombs and destruction…and excited about what the future would hold for me…



And then it happened…a bullet screamed down through the air, and ripped through my brain, collapsing me into a bloody heap on the ground…The most fucked up part is it wasn’t a sniper who had fired the shot…or a rogue terrorist…It was one of my fellow countrymen. He had fired the bullet in the air as a celebration…It just happened to come back down to the earth exactly where I stood…



For the next three years I was confined to my bed…While other boys my age were having their first kisses, or getting to second or third base with their crushes behind the cafeteria…I was sweating through blankets and hoping I’d live…To say this experience made me socially awkward is a VAST understatement...



When I could finally stand on my own again at the age of 15, life was a living hell…girls would make fun of my limp, guys would pick on me for being weak, and basically my whole life was a nightmare that ran on repeat.



But in college, things started to change. Being surrounded by tight-bodied women all day…all basking in their sexual peak…was just too much to bear…I heard stories about the CRAZIEST, KINKIEST shit that was going on…



And I desperately wanted to be a part of it all.



So I decided that enough was enough…I was going to meet and sleep with as many girls as I possibly could…even if it killed me…



So I devoted my life to that one pursuit – getting inside girls panties…



 [Truncated Part About How He Searches For Answers And Traditional Solutions Don’t Work]



So I started spending five, six, sometimes even seven nights out per week, at clubs all over Europe…I tirelessly practiced approaching women and even kept a journal of every conversation and every technique I was using…



Being a cripple, I had to work EXTRA hard…if you’re afraid of rejection now, imagine how hard it is when you walk with a pathetic, embarrassing limp. I couldn’t rely on my looks at all…I had to overcome a GLARING objection right then and there…And because she was looking for ways to DITCH me before I’d even said a word, I had to make the way I approached women FLAWLESS…



I failed a LOT early on…That’s because just like you, I had pretty much ZERO clue what I was doing. Every now and then I would “luck” out, and end up going home with a girl…but it just didn’t seem like there was any rhyme or reason to why it was happening.



But then, about a year into my quest to master the art of female conquest…something really WERID occurred…



I realized that almost every single time I was at a club…I could look out at the women surrounding me, and accurately predict which women were going to get laid that night. 



The first few times it happened, I shrugged it off as a dumb coincidence. But it kept occurring…night after night, week after week, and month after month…



And while it was pretty cool that I could predict the girls who were going to have sex that night, I didn’t do me JACK, because I couldn’t figure out why it was happening. The feeling was sort of similar to having a beautiful new Porsche 911 in your garage, but not knowing how to drive…Even though the key to taking home a different hot and sexy chick every night was right in front of me, I didn’t know how it worked, or what I should be doing to make it happen…



Then, one night, I got the answer I’d been looking for…



I’d just stumbled through another botched pick up attempt, this one with a gorgeous Russian blond…and was dejectedly walking back to the bar with nothing but a pair of icy blue balls to show for my efforts. What made it even more frustrating was that the conversation had seemed to be going okay for the first few minutes, and then she’d suddenly just walked away…



Lonely, horny, and PISSED, I started to vent out loud to the man sitting next to me…I told him about how I could choose any girl in the entire club, and instantly be able to tell him whether or not she was going to go home with a man that night…The Russian girl had been one of them, and I couldn’t understand what her problem was…or why she hadn’t picked me….



The man just smiled, and ordered me a vodka and soda…We both watched as that same blond walked out of the club with a guy she’d only spoken with for about 3 minutes, and I’m pretty sure steam was pouring out of my ears. Suddenly, the guy sitting next to me turned around and stared me dead in the eyes…



“I can tell which girls are going to get laid and which one’s aren’t too,” he said, “but I can also give you the reason why.”



Desperate to find out what this mystery man knew, I begged him to tell me the reason. We started to talk and he told me that he was a PhD and university professor who specialized in human biology…He’d had papers published in pretty much every scientific journal you can imagine, was a member of the Royal Academy of Science in London, and had even been offered a knighthood for his work studying the science of human mating habits…



He borrowed a pen from one of the bartenders, and begin to write on a napkin as he talked…I couldn’t see what it was he was scribbling, but what I heard him saying absolutely BLEW my mind…He explained to me that there was a biological loophole in female sexuality…a special window of time each month when they become DESPERATE to get laid…It’s not something they can control…they literally walk with these almost primitive urges. 



There are TWO KEYS, the doctor said, to being the one who gives these sex-crazed women the TLC they are craving for…instead of the guy who’s always watching as they choose someone else. 



The first key is being able to recognize these signs…Like I told you earlier, they are INVISIBLE to any man who doesn’t know what they are…In fact, the girl herself has NO IDEA that she’s giving them off…So unless you have your own pair of X-Ray glasses, you’re shit out of luck.



The second key is knowing what to say, and how to act when you’re around these women. He called these “biological triggers,” and using them, a man could increase his chances of immediately sleeping with any gorgeous women, even if he’d never met her before in his life…by more than 85%...



Now as he finished telling me all of this, my head raced with a thousand questions…Before I could form the words in my mouth, however, he excused himself and walked over to a group of seven or so women…leaving me to watch in amazement as he began to talk to a dark haired women in the group…I can still remember how long and tan her legs were, how perfect her body was, and how I would have given ANYTHING to take her home. 



But most importantly, I remember how my mouth hung open in awe as 10 minutes later, she tugged him by the arm, and led him out into the parking lot…



Feeling a little dazed by what I’d just witnessed, I turned around and reached for my drink on the bar. Sitting next to it was the napkin he’d been writing on, and it’s a piece of paper I still have to this day…



Scribbled on a tiny cocktail napkin, this man had given me the ROSETTA STONE of female sexuality. On one side was written “The 5 Signs” – with each one listed out. On the other side it said “the 4 triggers”…and sure enough each trigger had been penned down for me to see…



So I started using what he’d taught me. And what happened next will make you laugh: I got BORED with clubs. You see, after spending more than a year of my life filled with horny, pent up sexual frustration…I was suddenly sleeping with any girl of my choosing, on-demand…I went from desperate to get laid to desperate for a new challenge….



So I decided to take the weapons that this doctor had given me…and see if they worked outside of a high energy night club…
